mapper.select:
select a.* from xm_person a left join sys_org b on a.org_id = b.id where a.is_delete = 0
and (a.org_id = #{orgId} or b.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId} ,']%') )
and a.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and a.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and a.is_admin = #{isAdmin}
and a.state = #{state}
and find_in_set(#{type},a.type)

select a.* from xm_person a left join xm_person_org b on a.id = b.person_id left join sys_org c on b.org_id = c.id where a.is_delete = 0 and c.is_delete = 0
and (b.org_id = #{orgId} or c.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId} ,']%') )
and a.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and a.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and a.state = #{state}
and find_in_set(a.type,#{type})
